headline: Best Buy (BBY) Q1 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Best Buy (BBY), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Grand Theft Auto Is Hiding the Holes in Take-Two’s Earnings Release
summary: The videogame maker said it expects fiscal 2027 net bookings to be between $8 billion to $8.2 billion, below Wall Street estimates of $9.13 billion.

raw.headline: Grand Theft Auto Is Hiding the Holes in Take-Two’s Earnings Release

headline: A Look At Best Buy (BBY) Valuation As Earnings Expectations And Cautious Sentiment Shape The May 28 Report
summary: Best Buy (BBY) heads into its May 28 earnings release with expectations for higher revenue, but recent commentary points to cautious sentiment around the likelihood of an earnings beat and near term stock reaction. See our latest analysis for Best Buy. With the share price at $61.15, Best Buy’s 7 day share price return of 7.9% contrasts with a year to date share price decline of 11.6% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 8.7%. This suggests momentum has picked up recently even as...
